en.name: Creatinine in blood
en.longDescription: ## Definition & Clinical Context Creatinine is a waste product of muscle metabolism, freely filtered by the glomerulus; its concentration in blood is the routine marker of glomerular filtration rate (GFR) and renal function [1]. The source data will typically be a single numeric result per patient-timestamp, produced by a biochemistry analyser. Results are reported as a substance concentration in µmol/L (SI unit, used in Europe) or as a mass concentration in mg/dL (used in the US) [2]. This concept set aggregates creatinine measurements across blood specimens (serum, plasma, arterial, venous and unspecified blood). Cord blood and fetus specimens are excluded. ## Included Concepts The set is anchored on five LOINC Hierarchy concepts (one per blood specimen, scoped to `Chemistry - non-challenge`), with their descendants pulled in. After exclusions, the set resolves to nine LOINC "Lab Test" concepts, grouped here by specimen. ### Serum or plasma (default specimen for routine biochemistry) - *3020564 / 14682-9 — Creatinine [Moles/volume] in Serum or Plasma (LOINC)*: most widely used LOINC code worldwide (SI form). - *3016723 / 2160-0 — Creatinine [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma (LOINC)*: same measurand expressed as mass concentration (US form). - *1260102 / 103616-9 — Creatinine [Moles/volume] in Serum or Plasma by LC/MS/MS (LOINC)*: same measurand, with the LC/MS/MS method explicit (reference method). - *3022243 / 11042-9 — Creatinine [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma --pre dialysis (LOINC)*: point-in-time measurement immediately before a haemodialysis session. - *3018968 / 11041-1 — Creatinine [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma --post dialysis (LOINC)*: point-in-time measurement immediately after a haemodialysis session. - *3040495 / 51619-5 — Creatinine [Moles/volume] in Serum or Plasma --pre dialysis (LOINC)*: same as `11042-9` expressed as substance concentration. - *3040209 / 51620-3 — Creatinine [Moles/volume] in Serum or Plasma --post dialysis (LOINC)*: same as `11041-1` expressed as substance concentration. ### Generic blood (specimen unspecified) - *40762887 / 59826-8 — Creatinine [Moles/volume] in Blood (LOINC)* - *3051825 / 38483-4 — Creatinine [Mass/volume] in Blood (LOINC)*: same measurand expressed as mass concentration. - *46235076 / 77140-2 — Creatinine [Moles/volume] in Serum, Plasma or Blood (LOINC)*: specimen-agnostic. ### Arterial blood - *3007760 / 21232-4 — Creatinine [Mass/volume] in Arterial blood (LOINC)* ### Venous blood - *3964702 / 101475-2 — Creatinine [Moles/volume] in Venous blood (LOINC)* **Note on units.** Recommended unit follows LOINC's `EXAMPLE_UCUM_UNITS`: **`umol/L`** (concept 8749 — micromole per litre) for `[Moles/volume]` codes and **`mg/dL`** (concept 8840) for `[Mass/volume]` codes. Conversion: `1 mg/dL ≈ 88.4 µmol/L` (molar mass of creatinine = 113.12 g/mol). ## Excluded Concepts The Serum/Plasma hierarchy above pulls in 10 LOINC concepts that are explicitly excluded, grouped by reason for exclusion. ### Predicted renal clearance — derived value (calculation from creatinine + demographics), not the raw measurement - *1091718 / 104805-7 — Creatinine renal clearance predicted* - *3035529 / 35591-7 — Creatinine renal clearance predicted by Cockcroft-Gault formula* - *3033962 / 35592-5 — Creatinine renal clearance/1.73 sq M.predicted by Cockcroft-Gault formula, BSA formula* - *3032720 / 50380-5 — Creatinine renal clearance/1.73 sq M.predicted among females by Cockcroft-Gault formula, BSA formula* - *3029545 / 50381-3 — Creatinine renal clearance/1.73 sq M.predicted among males by Cockcroft-Gault formula, BSA formula* ### Timed specimen series — protocol-specific timepoints, out of scope for routine creatinine - *3019397 / 16188-5 — Creatinine [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma --2 hour specimen* - *3035090 / 16189-3 — Creatinine [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma --4 hour specimen* - *43055236 / 72271-0 — Creatinine [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma --pre contrast* ### Ratios — different measurand (ratio to another analyte) - *3033837 / 31045-8 — Creatinine/Urea nitrogen [Mass Ratio] in Serum or Plasma* ### Aggregated value — not a point-in-time measurement - *3045369 / 44784-7 — Creatinine [Mass/volume] (Maximum value during study) in Serum or Plasma* The set also deliberately omits the following LOINC concepts: - **Cord blood and fetus specimens**: physiologically distinct from post-natal blood (foetal-placental circulation at birth). - **Urine specimens**: out of scope (captured by the separate "Urinary creatinine" concept set). - **Body fluid, CSF, dialysis fluid, peritoneal fluid, pleural fluid, gastric fluid, synovial fluid, vitreous fluid, amniotic fluid, DBS, stool specimens**: out of scope for a "blood" concept set. ## Mapping Notes - **Default concept** when the source reports "creatinine", "Cr", "creat", "créatinine" without further specification: `3020564 / 14682-9 — Creatinine [Moles/volume] in Serum or Plasma` (SI form, used in Europe). If the source uses US conventional units, prefer `3016723 / 2160-0 — Creatinine [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma`. - **Source reports a predicted creatinine clearance or eGFR (Cockcroft-Gault, MDRD, CKD-EPI)**: do **not** map. Predicted clearance is a derived value, not the raw creatinine measurement. - **Do not confuse with**: predicted creatinine clearance / eGFR (separate measurand), urinary creatinine (separate concept set), creatinine/urea ratio. ## References [1] Regenstrief Institute. LOINC code 14682-9 — Creatinine [Moles/volume] in Serum or Plasma. Available: https://loinc.org/14682-9/ [2] Nomenclature for Properties and Units (NPU). IFCC/IUPAC. NPU codes (current release). Available: https://npu-terminology.org/npu-database/
